name: Inbound Carrier Sales
description: Acme Logistics inbound carrier sales: FMCSA vet, load match, 3-round negotiation, mock transfer.

agent.name: Riley
agent.initial_message: Hi, thanks for calling Acme Logistics carrier sales — this is Riley. What lane are you running today?

trigger.note: Predefined Webhook trigger. HappyRobot's Web Call test populates room_name when initiated from the editor; that's the audio source the inbound voice agent uses. We tried the Inbound Phone trigger (event 0192a20c-cb70-7bf2-977a-b7edc14dcd66) with the Onboarding +16282142490 number but hit a platform-side 'Dispatch rules conflict' (HTTP 500) that requires HR support intervention to clear — falling back to the Predefined Webhook keeps everything programmatically self-serve and works for the web-call test path.

version_history.note: Original workflow, Predefined Webhook trigger, webhook URLs placeholder. Deleted during the v4 trigger-swap rollback.
Webhook X-API-Key headers updated to deployed API_KEY.
Added Deepgram Nova 3 transcriber + enable_denoised_stt + freight keyterms.
Attempted to in-place swap the trigger to Inbound Phone. HR's update_workflow_nodes silently kept the event_id; trigger configuration changed shape but event_id didn't. Rolled back.
Fresh workflow with Inbound Phone trigger + Onboarding number. Publish blocked by a stuck 'Dispatch rules conflict' platform error that needs HR support to clear. Deleted.
Predefined Webhook trigger with call_id+carrier_phone+room_name params. STT fully wired. Web call test in editor works end-to-end.
